name: quiz-platform
description: منصة المسابقات التفاعلية V14 - Interactive Quiz Platform with Capacitor Android support

scripts.single-file: vite build && echo '✓ Single-file build at dist/quiz-platform.html'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy android
scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug

author: Quiz Platform Team
